plan_metadata.name: Sample App With Azure Backend Local Debug

steps.description: Type ${{var:app_name:tab-app-with-azure-backend}}" into the search field labeled "🔍 Search samples" near the top of the "Samples" tab in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension within Visual Studio Code.
Click the blue "Create" button for the "Tab App with Azure Backend" sample in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension panel in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder" dropdown in the "Choose the folder where your project root folder will be located" dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Close (Ctrl+W)" button on the main README.md tab in Visual Studio Code to close the file preview.
